description_long: This is a matte black ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a smoothly curved handle attached to one side. The exterior features a prominent white geometric logo or pattern on one side, while the rest of the surface remains unadorned. The interior of the cup is a contrasting white, creating a striking visual difference from the dark exterior. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The rim is slightly rounded, and the base is flat, allowing the cup to sit stably on flat surfaces. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for both casual and professional urban environments.
description: A matte black ceramic cup with a white interior and a geometric white logo on one side, featuring a sturdy handle and a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white geometric logo and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and the logo partially visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle fully visible on the left and no logo visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the plain black surface and the logo barely visible on the right edge.
